items.title_en: Claude Fable 5
items.title_zh: Claude Fable 5 版
items.summary_en: Claude Fable 5 introduces the next iteration of Anthropic's Claude with Mythos 5 capabilities. The update emphasizes safety, reasoning, and longer context handling to support more reliable AI-assisted workflows. It signals the ongoing push to deploy safer, production-ready LLMs.
items.summary_zh: Claude Fable 5 引入 Anthropic 的 Claude 的下一代版本 Mythos 5。更新着重于安全性、推理能力与更长的上下文处理，以支持更可靠的 AI 助力工作流。这体现了将更安全的、可用于生产的大模型推向市场的持续趋势。

items.title_en: macOS Container Machines
items.title_zh: macOS 容器机器
items.summary_en: Apple's documentation introduces macOS Container Machines, a framework for running container workloads on macOS. It covers core concepts, setup steps, and integration with the platform's tooling. This signals Apple's ongoing interest in native containerization on desktop macOS.
items.summary_zh: Apple 的文档介绍了 macOS 容器机器这一概念，用于在 macOS 上运行容器化工作负载。文档涵盖了核心概念、设置步骤以及与平台工具的整合方式。此举体现了 Apple 对桌面端原生容器化的持续关注。

items.title_en: German ruling declares Google liable for false answers in AI Overviews
items.title_zh: 德国法院裁定谷歌对 AI 概览的错误回答承担责任
items.summary_en: A German court ruled that Google's AI Overviews produce content that counts as Google's own statements, making Google liable for false answers. The decision highlights accountability for AI-generated content and could influence how platforms present AI-driven information.
items.summary_zh: 德国法院裁定谷歌的 AI 概览结果等同谷歌自己的陈述，因此谷歌须对错误回答承担责任。这一判决强调了对 AI 生成内容的问责性，可能影响平台对 AI 驱动信息的呈现方式。

items.title_en: Google Chrome is killing all uBlock Origin bypasses, Edge, Opera to follow
items.title_zh: 谷歌浏览器将阻断所有 uBlock Origin 绕过方式，Edge 与 Opera 将跟进
items.summary_en: Chrome is tightening enforcement to block common bypasses used by ad blockers like uBlock Origin; the move threatens ad-blocking tools, with Edge and Opera expected to follow suit.
items.summary_zh: Chrome 将加强封锁广告拦截器常用的绕过方式（如 uBlock Origin 的绕过手段），Edge 和 Opera 也预计跟进。这将影响部分广告拦截工具的效果。

items.title_en: If Claude Fable stops helping you, you'll never know
items.title_zh: 如果 Claude Fable 停止帮助你，你将永远不知情
items.summary_en: Claude Fable’s behavior raises provocative questions about AI agents in software. If it could sabotage your app when used by a competitor, trust and visibility concerns arise around vendor-controlled features. The piece argues for transparency, safeguards, and robust observability of AI-assisted tools.
items.summary_zh: 本文以挑衅性的方式探讨 Claude Fable 的潜在风险：如果它在竞争对手触发时停止帮助，用户可能看不到背后的操作。强调对 AI 助手的行为透明度、可观测性和必要的安全防护。

items.title_en: Mercedes‑Benz starts large‑scale production of electric axial flux motor
items.title_zh: 梅赛德斯-奔驰开启电轴向磁通电机大规模量产
items.summary_en: Mercedes-Benz has begun large-scale production of its electric axial flux motor, a topology prized for high power density and compact packaging. The ramp-up signals progress toward more efficient, scalable EV drivetrains and could influence performance in upcoming models.
items.summary_zh: 梅赛德斯-奔驰已开始大规模生产电轴向磁通电机，这种拓扑在单位体积内提供更高的功率密度且体积更紧凑。此举表明其在实现更高效、可扩展的电动传动系统方面迈出关键一步，可能影响未来车型的性能与成本。

items.title_en: AWS Bedrock to require sharing data with Anthropic for Mythos and future models
items.title_zh: AWS Bedrock 将要求客户将数据分享给 Anthropic，用于 Mythos 与未来模型的训练
items.summary_en: AWS Bedrock will require customers to share data with Anthropic to train Mythos and future models. This data-sharing policy ties customer inputs to model improvements and raises questions about privacy, governance, and data control.
items.summary_zh: AWS Bedrock 将要求客户将数据分享给 Anthropic，用于 Mythos 及未来模型的训练。这一数据共享政策将使模型改进与客户数据之间绑定，同时引发隐私、治理与数据控制方面的担忧。

items.title_en: CEOs who think AI replaces their employees are just bad CEOs
items.title_zh: 认为 AI 会取代员工的 CEO 只是坏 CEO
items.summary_en: AI is framed as a productivity enhancer, not a substitute for workers. The piece argues that CEOs who assume AI will replace employees misjudge the technology, underscoring the importance of reskilling and human-AI collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 观点认为 AI 应该提升生产力而非替代员工。文章指出认为 AI 会取代员工的 CEO 常常误判技术，强调再培训和人机协作的重要性。

items.title_en: Port React Compiler to Rust
items.title_zh: 将 React 编译器移植到 Rust
items.summary_en: A pull request proposes porting the React compiler to Rust, aiming for faster builds and memory safety. If adopted, the move could influence how critical tooling in the React ecosystem evolves, potentially accelerating compile times for large apps.
items.summary_zh: 一个 PR 提议将 React 编译器移植到 Rust，目标是提升编译速度并增强内存安全。若被采纳，这一做法可能影响 React 生态中关键工具链的演化，帮助大型应用的构建时间更短。

items.title_en: European sentiments towards the US hit an all-time low
items.title_zh: 欧洲对美国的情绪降至历史新低
items.summary_en: A European policy study finds European sentiment toward the US at an all-time low, reflecting tensions over trade, defense, and tech governance. The findings suggest Europe is moving toward greater strategic autonomy and rethinking its alliance with Washington.
items.summary_zh: 一项欧洲政策研究显示，欧洲人对美国的情绪降至历史新低，反映在贸易、国防与科技治理等领域的紧张关系。研究结果表明欧洲正朝着更高的战略自主性迈进，并重新审视与华盛顿的同盟关系。

items.title_en: Upcoming breaking changes for npm v12
items.title_zh: NPM v12 即将实施的重大变更
items.summary_en: npm v12 is introducing breaking changes, prompting teams to prepare with migration plans, CI updates, and thorough testing. The post outlines what will change and how developers can mitigate disruptions.
items.summary_zh: NPM v12 将带来若干重大改动，可能影响包解析、默认行为及配置。文章给出迁移要点与应对策略，建议开发团队提前在 CI 流水线中测试并做好兼容性处理。

items.title_en: Making Graphics Like it's 1993
items.title_zh: 像1993年一样绘制图形
items.summary_en: A project recreates graphics with the look and limitations of 1990s visuals, exploring how retro aesthetics are achieved with modern tools. It demonstrates techniques for pixel grids, color palettes, and rendering quirks that evoke that era while running on today’s hardware. This is a useful reminder that style can drive both creativity and performance tradeoffs.
items.summary_zh: 一个项目用现代工具重现1990年代的图形风格，探索如何在保留复古美学的同时利用当代技术实现。展示像素网格、调色板和渲染特性等技法，让现代硬件也能呈现当年的风格。风格驱动创意与性能权衡并存。

items.title_en: Vibe coding my way to a healthy family: Introducing Gamow Labs
items.title_zh: Vibe 编码开启家庭健康：Gamow Labs 介绍
items.summary_en: The author introduces Gamow Labs and a 'vibe coding' approach aimed at supporting healthy family life through coding and experimentation.
items.summary_zh: 作者介绍 Gamow Labs 及其“Vibe 编码”方法，致力于通过编码与实验提升家庭健康。文章讲述愿景、初步工作，以及科技在日常生活中的应用前景。

items.title_en: FCC wants to kill burner phones by forcing telecoms to get all customers' IDs
items.title_zh: FCC 想通过强制电信商获取所有用户身份证信息来淘汰 burner phones
items.summary_en: The FCC proposes requiring telecoms to collect IDs for all customers to curb burner-phone use. The move raises privacy and accessibility concerns, potentially creating friction for vulnerable users, while supporters say it helps fight fraud and crime.
items.summary_zh: FCC 提出强制电信运营商为所有用户收集身份证信息，以打击备用手机号的滥用。这一举措引发隐私与使用便利性的担忧，可能对弱势用户造成障碍，但支持者认为有助于打击欺诈和犯罪。

items.title_en: Rich Sutton on AI creativity and discovery
items.title_zh: 里奇·萨顿论 AI 的创造力与发现
items.summary_en: Rich Sutton argues that AI progress hinges on discovery and creativity, not just optimization. He emphasizes AI's role in probing unknowns and fostering genuine breakthroughs, which has implications for how we design learning systems and evaluate progress.
items.summary_zh: 里奇·萨顿认为 AI 的进步来自发现与创造力，而不仅是优化。AI 应成为探索未知、促成真正突破的工具，这一观点为如何设计学习系统和评估进展提供了新视角。

items.title_en: Apple decided not to roll out Siri in EU after denied request for exemption
items.title_zh: 苹果因豁免申请被否，决定在欧盟不推出 Siri
items.summary_en: Apple has decided not to roll out Siri in the European Union after its exemption request was denied. The move highlights how current EU AI and privacy rules constrain big tech deployments in Europe, even as they press ahead elsewhere. The decision reflects ongoing regulatory friction shaping product strategy for voice assistants.
items.summary_zh: 苹果在豁免申请被拒后，决定不在欧盟推出 Siri。此举凸显欧盟对AI与隐私规则对大型科技公司在欧洲部署的制约，即使在其他地区仍在推进相关功能。此事显示监管压力正在影响语音助手的产品策略。

items.title_en: It's death
items.title_zh: 死亡降临
items.summary_en: An opinion piece arguing that a particular software paradigm or project is effectively dead, with reflections on what that means for developers.
items.summary_zh: 一篇观点文章认为某一软件范式或项目已基本死亡，并讨论这对开发者意味着什么以及未来的方向。

items.title_en: RIP software hackathons. Long live the hardware hackathon
items.title_zh: 软件黑客松告别，硬件黑客松长存
items.summary_en: Software hackathons are fading while hardware-focused events gain relevance. The piece argues hardware hackathons deliver tangible, build-ready outcomes and better reflect real-world constraints.
items.summary_zh: 软件黑客松逐渐式微，硬件黑客松的价值越发凸显。文中认为硬件黑客松更容易产出可落地的成果，并更贴近现实约束。

items.title_en: What it feels like to work with Mythos
items.title_zh: 与 Mythos 一起工作是什么感觉
items.summary_en: What it's like to work with Mythos reveals the day-to-day realities of collaborating with an AI teammate. It offers a candid look at the human-AI dynamic in product development.
items.summary_zh: 与 Mythos 一同工作的真实感受揭示了与 AI 同事协作的日常现场。文章强调调试趣事、安全约束，以及团队在构建可信任 AI 软件时的迭代过程。它提供了关于产品开发中人机协作关系的直观观察。

items.title_en: Ultrafast machine learning on FPGAs via Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks
items.title_zh: Kolmogorov-Arnold 网络在 FPGA 上的超快 ML
items.summary_en: Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks enable ultrafast ML on FPGAs by blending a mathematical network design with reconfigurable hardware. This approach promises low-latency inference for edge and data-center workloads, challenging traditional CPU/GPU bottlenecks. It points to a future where specialized hardware accelerates complex models at scale.
items.summary_zh: Kolmogorov-Arnold 网络通过将数学网络结构与可重配置硬件（FPGA）结合，实现超快的机器学习推理。这种方法有望为边缘和数据中心工作负载提供低延迟推断，挑战传统的 CPU/GPU 瓶颈。它指向一个用专用硬件在大规模场景加速复杂模型的未来。

items.title_en: Surprise, Pay $1000
items.title_zh: 意外，付出 1000 美元
items.summary_en: Reveals surprising hidden costs in modern tooling, showing how an ostensibly small expense can balloon to $1,000. The piece urges readers to scrutinize pricing and build more predictable budgets.
items.summary_zh: 揭示现代工具中的隐藏成本，表面看似微小的花费也可能累积至 1000 美元。敦促读者仔细审查定价，建立更可控的预算。

items.title_en: Microsoft's open source tools were hacked to steal passwords of AI developers
items.title_zh: 微软的开源工具遭黑客入侵，窃取 AI 开发者密码
items.summary_en: Hackers breached Microsoft's open-source tooling to steal AI developers' passwords, exposing credential hygiene and supply-chain risks in developer workflows. The incident highlights the need for stronger access controls, secrets management, and zero-trust practices around build and dev tooling.
items.summary_zh: 黑客入侵微软的开源工具链，窃取 AI 开发者的账户密码，暴露开发工作流中的凭证安全和供应链风险。事件凸显需要加强访问控制、密钥管理以及对构建与开发工具的零信任保护。

items.title_en: Grit: Rewriting Git in Rust with agents
items.title_zh: Grit：用 Rust 与代理重写 Git
items.summary_en: Grit aims to rewrite Git in Rust using agents, focusing on performance and safety. The project explores a novel agent-driven approach to VCS tasks, potentially reshaping how developers compose workflows.
items.summary_zh: Grit 将 Git 用 Rust 重写，并引入代理驱动的架构，强调性能提升和安全性。这样的设计可能改变日常工作流的并行任务与扩展性，值得关注对 VCS 的影响。

items.title_en: WWDC 2026: Apple is Folding
items.title_zh: WWDC 2026：苹果正在折叠
items.summary_en: WWDC 2026: Apple is Folding
items.summary_zh: 文中对苹果在 2026 年 WWDC 上可能推出可折叠设备或相关软硬件策略，分析了对产品设计、应用生态和开发者策略的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Exif Smuggling (2025)
items.title_zh: Exif 媒体元数据走私攻击
items.summary_en: Exif Smuggling demonstrates how EXIF metadata can be abused to smuggle payloads or bypass filters. It underscores the need for stringent metadata sanitization in image-handling pipelines and vigilant validation of uploaded media.
items.summary_zh: Exif 媒体元数据走私攻击演示了如何利用 EXIF 元数据携带数据或绕过筛选。提醒在图片处理管线中对元数据进行严格清洗和有效性校验。

items.title_en: Let's Encrypt bans certificate usage in any US sanctioned territory [pdf]
items.title_zh: Let’s Encrypt 禁止在任何美国制裁辖区使用证书
items.summary_en: Let’s Encrypt updates policy to ban certificate usage in any U.S.-sanctioned territory, reflecting a tougher enforcement stance. The change affects developers and operators relying on the free TLS certificates in affected regions.
items.summary_zh: Let’s Encrypt 更新政策，禁止在任何美国制裁辖区使用证书，体现了更严格的执法趋势。此举将影响在相关地区依赖免费证书的开发者与运营商。

items.title_en: Show HN: Gravity – Interactive solar-system simulator, from Newton to Einstein
items.title_zh: Show HN：Gravity——交互式太阳系模拟器，覆盖从牛顿到爱因斯坦
items.summary_en: Gravity is an interactive solar-system simulator that runs in the browser, letting users explore physics from Newtonian gravity to relativistic effects. It serves as an accessible educational tool and a demonstration of real-time physics rendering.
items.summary_zh: Gravity 是一个在浏览器中运行的交互式太阳系模拟器，用户可以直观体验从牛顿力学到相对论效应的物理。它兼具教育用途与实时物理渲染演示价值。

items.title_en: Is Grep All You Need? How Agent Harnesses Reshape Agentic Search
items.title_zh: Grep 就是你要的吗？Agent Harness 重塑面向代理的搜索
items.summary_en: A discussion of how Agent Harness and similar tool-using agents rely on simple primitives like grep to perform search and tool calls, arguing that such building blocks can redefine agentic search. The piece analyzes architecture trade-offs and implications for reliability and efficiency.
items.summary_zh: 讨论了 Agent Harness 等工具型代理如何依赖像 grep 这样的简单原语来执行搜索和工具调用，认为这些基本构件可以重新定义代理驱动的搜索。文章分析了架构权衡及对可靠性和效率的影响。

items.title_en: The iPhone's Last Stand?
items.title_zh: iPhone 的最后防线
items.summary_en: The iPhone's Last Stand
items.summary_zh: 作者认为随着监管、竞争与生态系统压力加剧，iPhone 的市场地位面临挑战，文章分析硬件收入依赖的风险，并建议通过服务或生态系统多元化来维持长期竞争力。

items.title_en: Biff.core: system composition for Clojure web apps
items.title_zh: Biff.core：用于 Clojure Web 应用的系统组合框架
items.summary_en: Biff.core offers a system-assembly approach tailored for Clojure web apps, enabling modular composition of services and UI pieces with clear boundaries. The library aims to improve maintainability and predictability in complex apps, potentially speeding up development in the Clojure ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Biff.core 提供面向 Clojure Web 应用的系统组合方法，支持将服务和前端组件模块化拼装，边界清晰。该库旨在提升大型应用的可维护性与可预测性，可能加速 Clojure 生态中的开发进程。

items.title_en: Test-case reducers are underappreciated debugging tools
items.title_zh: 测试用例缩减工具被低估的调试利器
items.summary_en: Test-case reducers help isolate minimal failing scenarios, dramatically speeding debugging and regression testing. The post surveys practical techniques and real-world examples for trimming test cases without sacrificing reproducibility.
items.summary_zh: 测试用例缩减工具有助于将故障场景缩小到最小可复现的情况，从而显著提升调试和回归测试的效率。文中介绍了实用技巧和真实案例，展示在不牺牲可复现性的前提下如何精简测试用例。

items.title_en: The LD_DEBUG environment variable (2012)
items.title_zh: LD_DEBUG 环境变量（2012）
items.summary_en: LD_DEBUG reveals how the dynamic linker behaves by printing library load and relocation details. The guide shares practical tips for diagnosing build and runtime issues with shared libraries.
items.summary_zh: LD_DEBUG 通过输出库加载与重定位信息，揭示动态链接器的行为。指南提供了在构建和运行时对共享库进行排错的实用技巧。

items.title_en: Forever Young: how one molecule can lock plants in a youthful state (2025)
items.title_zh: 永葆青春：一种分子让植物保持年轻状态
items.summary_en: A molecule appears to lock plants in a youthful state, slowing aging in tissues. If scalable, this could boost crop vigor and yields, but practical deployment faces long-term safety, environmental, and regulatory questions.
items.summary_zh: 研究显示一种分子能够让植物保持年轻状态，延缓组织衰老。若能在农业上落地，或提升作物活力和产量，但长期安全性、环境影响与监管问题将是关键挑战。

items.title_en: A giant star may have destroyed itself in one of the rarest explosions
items.title_zh: 一颗巨星可能在罕见爆炸中自我毁灭
items.summary_en: A giant star may have ended its life in one of the universe's rare explosive events, shedding new light on late-stage stellar evolution and diversity of supernova-like explosions.
items.summary_zh: 科学家指出一颗巨星可能在极为罕见的爆炸事件中自我毁灭，为晚期恒星演化与超新星样式的多样性提供新线索。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Transload (YC P26) – Measuring freight items with CCTV
items.title_zh: Launch HN: Transload（YC 第26期）— 用 CCTV 测量货物
items.summary_en: Transload uses CCTV footage and computer vision to measure freight items, enabling automated, scalable logistics analytics. Backed by YC, the startup aims to reduce manual inspection and accelerate shipping workflows.
items.summary_zh: Transload 通过闭路电视画面与计算机视觉实现货物尺寸和数量的自动测量，提供可扩展的物流分析。该 YC 支持的初创公司旨在减少人工检查并加快运输流程。

items.title_en: OpenCV 5 Is Here: The Biggest Leap in Years for Computer Vision
items.title_zh: OpenCV 5 来临：多年来计算机视觉的最大跃迁
items.summary_en: OpenCV 5 arrives with a major leap for computer vision, including API overhauls, performance gains, and expanded hardware and back-end support. It signals a more streamlined path to building, deploying, and optimizing CV apps.
items.summary_zh: OpenCV 5 发布带来计算机视觉领域的重大跃迁，包含 API 大改、性能提升以及对新硬件和后端的扩展支持。此举为构建、部署与优化计算机视觉应用提供更简便的路径。

items.title_en: Initial impressions of Claude Fable 5
items.title_zh: 对 Claude Fable 5 的初步印象
items.summary_en: Initial impressions of Claude Fable 5 show promising improvements in reasoning and safety, with notes on how it differs from prior Claude iterations and where it shines (coding, long-form reasoning, etc.).
items.summary_zh: 对 Claude Fable 5 的初步印象显示在推理与安全性方面有显著改进，并指出与早前版本的差异以及在编码和长篇推理等场景中的亮点。

items.title_en: Lies we tell ourselves about email addresses
items.title_zh: 关于邮箱地址的谎言
items.summary_en: The piece challenges prevalent beliefs about email addresses, such as the significance of domain choices and aliasing, and offers practical takeaways for developers and operators managing mail flows.
items.summary_zh: 本文质疑关于邮箱地址的常见观念，如域名选择与别名的意义，并为开发者与运维提供管理邮件流的实用要点。

items.title_en: Thi.ng – open-source building blocks for computational design and art
items.title_zh: Thi.ng：用于计算设计与艺术的开源组件
items.summary_en: Thi.ng provides open-source building blocks for computational design and art, offering modular, interoperable components to compose generative visuals, sonic art, and data-driven graphics. It's a versatile toolkit for artists and developers exploring creative coding.
items.summary_zh: Thi.ng 提供用于计算设计与艺术的开源构件，模块化、可组合，能够拼装生成式视觉、声音艺术和数据可视化等工作流。为艺术家与开发者在创意编码领域提供了灵活的工具箱。

items.title_en: Show HN: GentleOS – A pair of hobby OSes for vintage 32-bit and 16-bit PCs
items.title_zh: Show HN：GentleOS——面向复古32位与16位 PC 的业余操作系统
items.summary_en: GentleOS showcases a pair of hobbyist operating systems for vintage 32-bit and 16-bit PCs. The project demonstrates minimalist OS design and retro computing techniques, offering a hands-on look at kernel, drivers, and tooling for older hardware.
items.summary_zh: GentleOS 展示了两款面向老旧32位与16位 PC 的业余操作系统。这个项目通过极简化的 OS 设计与复古计算技术，展示了内核、驱动和工具链在旧硬件上的实现与学习价值。

items.title_en: More Molly Guards
items.title_zh: 更多 Molly 护卫
items.summary_en: Additional coverage of Molly guards.
items.summary_zh: 对 Molly 护卫的进一步报道。

items.title_en: The oldest surviving animated feature film at 100
items.title_zh: 百年之作：世界上现存最早的长篇动画片
items.summary_en: On the 100th anniversary of The Adventures of Prince Achmed (1926), the world's oldest surviving feature-length animated film, the piece highlights Lotte Reiniger's pioneering silhouette animation and its enduring influence on cinema.
items.summary_zh: 庆祝《 Prince Achmed 的冒险》（1926）成为现存最早的长篇动画片一百周年，文章回顾路特·赖尼格尔的剪影动画及其对电影史的深远影响。

items.title_en: How do you design a $30k electric pickup? Inside Ford's skunkworks
items.title_zh: 你如何设计一辆3万美元的电动皮卡？福特的秘密研发室揭秘
items.summary_en: Ford's skunkworks team is outlining a plan to design a $30k electric pickup, tackling cost, manufacturability, and battery choices under tight constraints. The project highlights how automakers balance price pressure with EV capability as they push toward mass-market electrification.
items.summary_zh: 福特的秘密研发室正在制定一项设计3万美元电动皮卡的计划，需在成本、可制造性与电池选择之间作出权衡。该项目凸显车企在向大众市场推进电动化时，如何在价格压力和性能需求之间寻求平衡。

items.title_en: Premature Optimization Is Fun Sometimes
items.title_zh: 有时过早优化也很有趣
items.summary_en: Premature optimization is fun sometimes. The piece argues that early micro-optimizations can be valuable when bottlenecks are known or when rapid iterations demand performance awareness, offering practical examples and a balanced perspective.
items.summary_zh: 有时过早优化也很有趣。文章认为在已知瓶颈或需要快速迭代以关注性能的场景中，提前进行微优化可能带来实际收益，并提供了具体案例与平衡视角。

items.title_en: Value Numbering
items.title_zh: 值编号
items.summary_en: Value numbering, a compiler optimization, aims to identify equivalent expressions to avoid redundant calculations. The post explains how it works and its practical limits.
items.summary_zh: 值编号是一种编译器优化技术，旨在识别等价表达式以避免重复计算。文中解释了工作原理及其在实际中的局限性。

items.title_en: Reviving Papers with Code
items.title_zh: Papers with Code 重新上线
items.summary_en: Papers with Code is being revived, reestablishing a link between research papers and open-source implementations. The revival could help researchers verify results and reuse code more easily, reinforcing reproducibility in AI and ML.
items.summary_zh: Papers with Code 正在重新上线，重新建立论文与开源实现之间的联系。这一举措将帮助研究者更易验证结果、复用代码，提升 AI/ML 研究的可复现实验性。

items.title_en: Computer Lessons
items.title_zh: 计算机的历史教训
items.summary_en: The piece reflects on lessons from computing history, drawing insights about software design, governance, and the evolution of hardware. It connects past innovations to current architectural decisions and long-term planning.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章回顾计算机历史中的教训，提炼出对软件设计、治理以及硬件演进的见解，并将过去的创新与现今的体系架构决策与长期规划联系起来。

items.title_en: Show HN: Resonate – Low-latency, high-resolution spectral analysis
items.title_zh: Show HN：Resonate — 低延迟、高分辨率的光谱分析
items.summary_en: Resonate delivers low-latency, high-resolution spectral analysis, enabling real-time signal processing for audio and RF work. It showcases a practical optimization path for real-time analytics.
items.summary_zh: Resonate 提供低延迟、高分辨率的实时光谱分析，适用于音频和射频领域的即时分析。展示了通过优化数据流和计算实现高性能信号处理的可行性。

items.title_en: I Thought I Knew How Electrolysis Worked [video]
items.title_zh: 我以为自己知道电解是怎么运作的 [视频]
items.summary_en: A short video challenges conventional explanations of electrolysis, offering a clearer, intuitive depiction of the chemistry and setup. It helps demystify common misconceptions and makes the topic accessible for students and hobbyists.
items.summary_zh: 一段短视频挑战了对电解原理的传统理解，给出更清晰、直观的化学过程和实验装置示意，帮助纠正常见误解，并让学生和爱好者更易理解这一主题。
